{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Iteration 129: Oasis
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Iteration 129: Oasis]] is a light in the cluster of [[Sector]] 12 that turned black and withered away.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
